session_1_summary: 4 iterations. 5 research domains (KM, self-improvement, frameworks, A-MEM deep dive, vault navigation). 5 hypotheses implemented (consolidation, taxonomy, adversarial, two-phase linking, backward evolution). 5 principles consolidated. 6 self-evolution rules. 6 versions deployed. 2 bugs fixed.
